title: How to Display Hostaway Reviews on Your Website
summary: How to connect Hostaway reviews and display them automatically on your GAS website.
content:
If you use Hostaway as your channel manager, GAS can pull in guest reviews from channels like Airbnb and Booking.com and display them on your website automatically.

BEFORE YOU START
- Your Hostaway account must be connected to GAS via the Channel Manager section
- Reviews must have been synced from Hostaway (this happens automatically once connected)
- You need the Hostaway Listing ID for the property you want to show reviews for

STEP 1 — Set the review source
1. In GAS Admin, go to Create Websites
2. Find your site and click Edit or Settings
3. Click the Reviews tab
4. Make sure Enable Reviews Section is turned on
5. In the Review Source dropdown, select Hostaway Reviews

STEP 2 — Enter your Hostaway Listing ID
1. A new field appears: Hostaway Property ID
2. Enter the Hostaway Listing ID for your property
3. You can find this in your Hostaway dashboard under Listings
4. Click Save

STEP 3 — Customise the appearance
You can also customise:
- Section Title — e.g. 'What Our Guests Say'
- Section Subtitle — e.g. 'Real reviews from real guests'
- Background Colour — the section background
- Text Colour — heading and review text colour
- Card Background — the review card colour
- Star Colour — the colour of the rating stars

All colour and text settings support translations if your site is multilingual.

HOW IT WORKS
When a guest visits your website, the reviews section fetches the latest reviews from GAS that were synced from Hostaway. Each review card shows:
- Star rating (1-5 stars)
- The guest's review text
- The reviewer's name
- The date and source channel (e.g. Airbnb, Booking.com)

Up to 6 reviews are displayed by default, sorted by most recent first.

OTHER REVIEW SOURCES
GAS supports four review sources:
- Manual — you type in testimonials yourself
- GAS Reviews App — uses the built-in GAS reviews system
- Repuso Widget — embeds a Repuso review widget
- Hostaway Reviews — pulls synced reviews from Hostaway channels

You can switch between sources at any time from the Review Source dropdown.

PARTNER API
Partners can also fetch Hostaway reviews via the public API:
GET /api/public/hostaway-reviews?property_id=HOSTAWAY_LISTING_ID&limit=6

This returns a JSON array of reviews with id, reviewer_name, rating, text, date, and source fields. No authentication is required.

Need help? Contact the GAS team at hello@gas.travel
